certification: UNDERPOWERED (DSR 0.47 < 0.95); forward wall is the only certifier — not promoted

params.entry: in-range open the week after a green weekly bounce off the 44-week SMA
params.exits: half at +2R; remainder trails the 20-day SMA -4% (ratchet); stop = signal-week low; all decided at the weekly close, filled Monday; 13-week cap

backtest.note: in-sample; 2023 = 49% of profit; top-of-plateau. Not indicative of future results.
